channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Cloud souverain : l’UE pourrait bannir Amazon, Google et Microsoft des données sensibles
item.description: L'Union européenne réfléchit sérieusement à fermer la porte de ses ministères aux géants américains du cloud. Selon une enquête de CNBC, des discussions internes à la Commission visent à imposer une infrastructure européenne pour les données publiques les plus sensibles.

item.title: 'What started as someone potentially trying to remove the background from a selfie ended with a custom .NET stealer rifling through their browser passwords': Experts warn that free image editor tool could actually be dangerous malware
item.description: Background removal services are being used in ClickFix attacks, delivering dangerous infostealer malware.

item.title: BT lays out plans to become 'digital backbone' of the UK for consumers and businesses alike
item.description: BT reveals new push for consumers and businesses alike as it confirms role as official telco partner for Euro 2028.

item.title: ChatGPT Has 'Goblin' Mania in the US. In China It Will 'Catch You Steadily'
item.description: OpenAI's chatbot has some weird linguistic tics in Chinese that are driving users crazy.

item.title: Elon Musk insultait Anthropic, il vient de signer un deal avec eux
item.description: Anthropic vient de signer un accord avec SpaceX pour aspirer plus de 300 mégawatts de calcul dans le supercalculateur Colossus 1 d'Elon Musk. Le même Musk qui qualifiait Anthropic d'« evil » il y a quelques mois.

item.title: Best Last-Minute Mother’s Day Deals on Mom-Approved Gifts (2026)
item.description: Give Mom the best and save some cash in the process with these legitimate discounts on WIRED-approved gifts.

item.title: Live updates from Elon Musk and Sam Altman’s court battle over the future of OpenAI
item.description: Sam Altman and Elon Musk are facing off in a high-stakes trial that could alter the future of OpenAI and its most well-known product, ChatGPT. In 2024, Musk filed a lawsuit accusing OpenAI of abandoning its founding mission of developing AI to benefit humanity and shifting focus to boosting profits instead. Elon Musk, his financial […]

item.title: DOGE’s Ethan Shaotran Is Now Running a Defense Tech Startup
item.description: In an email viewed by WIRED, Shaotran describes Blitz Industries as “a defense company backed by big names.”

item.title: Cette montre connectée fait la Balance entre performances sportives et élégance avec un prix abordable
item.description: L'Amazfit Balance 2 emporte un GPS personnalisable pour préserver la batterie. Un curieux mélange à découvrir pour 165,50 euros chez PC Componentes.

item.title: Your next TV could cost as little as £4.50 per month with these savings on Sky Glass
item.description: Both Sky Glass Air and Sky Glass Gen 2 models are included

item.title: Ce jeu vidéo GOTY potentiel est soudainement détesté ? La modération défaillante de Steam pointée du doigt
item.description: Le jeu Slay the Spire 2 subit un « review bombing » : de nombreux internautes se concertent pour descendre la note sur Steam. Pourquoi ? Pour harceler les développeurs.

item.title: How Anthropic’s Mythos has rewritten Firefox’s approach to cybersecurity
item.description: Security researchers at Mozilla say Anthropic's Mythos has unearthed a wealth of high-severity bugs in Firefox.

item.title: Qualcomm donne un coup de fouet aux smartphones à petit prix avec deux nouvelles puces
item.description: Wi-Fi 7 et 90 fps pour moins de 200 €, mais « réservés aux marchés émergents ». Du moins, c'est ce que Qualcomm prétend à chaque lancement.

item.title: A hacker ran me over with a robot lawn mower
item.description: I'm lying in the dirt. It's coming for me. Then, with a lurch, it's climbing up my chest. If Andreas Makris doesn't stop the 200-pound robot lawn mower in time, it could drag its blades across my body. Makris certainly can't reach over and hit the emergency stop button - he's nearly 6,000 miles away, […]

item.title: Inside the return of Xbox
item.description: Two weeks ago there was a buzz in the air inside Microsoft's studio D building. Hundreds of Xbox employees gathered early on a Thursday morning, packed into the hallways and atrium, to hear from Xbox CEO Asha Sharma. The "return of Xbox" slogan was plastered all over the walls of the building, the same message […]

item.title: The future of Disney Plus is a confused mess
item.description: Newly minted CEO Josh D'Amaro says that he wants to turn Disney Plus into "the immersive, interactive digital centerpiece of the company." It used to be that people went to the movies or theme parks to immerse themselves in Disney's fictional worlds. But now, D'Amaro says that he sees Disney Plus becoming "the primary relationship […]

item.title: How to watch Aston Villa vs Nottm Forest: Free streams for Europa League 2025/26 semi-final second leg
item.description: All the ways to watch Aston Villa vs Nottm Forest live streams online and from anywhere for free, in an all-English Europa League semi-final second leg.

item.title: Grok’s usage is so low that Elon Musk can sell compute to Anthropic
item.description: Anthropic says it’ll use all the AI compute capacity from SpaceX’s ‘Colossus 1’ data facility in Memphis. Welcome to AI Decoded, Fast Company’s weekly newsletter that breaks down the most important news in the world of AI. I’m Mark Sullivan, a senior writer at Fast Company, covering emerging tech, AI, and tech policy.

item.title: VPN deal of the week: I've found a $30 VPN that's faster than NordVPN, Surfshark, and ExpressVPN, can unblock your favorite streaming services, and has the best built-in ad blocker of any VPN I've tested — here's how to get yourself protected
item.description: PrivadoVPN offers a capable suite of VPN tools for only $30, so why aren't more people using cheap tools to protect themselves online.

item.title: Iranian hackers launch ransomware campaign looking to steal details via Microsoft Teams
item.description: An espionage campaign was concealed behind a ransomware attack by a commercial actor.

item.title: Apple TV drops a tense full-length trailer for Cape Fear — and it dials up the horror to a satisfying degree
item.description: Cape Fear's official trailer is terrifying and I'm so excited to watch the new Apple TV series in June.

item.title: Lenovo propose pas moins de 500 € de réduction sur un laptop 2-en-1 avec écran OLED tactile et certifié Copilot+
item.description: Le Lenovo Yoga 7i 2-en-1 Gen 10 est un PC portable convertible et polyvalent avec un design robuste, à retrouver sur le site de la marque pour 799,02 euros au lieu de 1 299,01 euros.

item.title: Google’s $9.99-per-month AI health coach launches May 19
item.description: The Gemini-powered health coach will act as a combination fitness coach, sleep expert, and health and wellness advisor.

item.title: There’s actually a good deal happening now on the Xbox Series X
item.description: It’s been tough to recommend the Xbox Series X recently, especially at the $649 price it has sold at since last October. But if you’re thinking about getting one, at least consider the Forza Horizon 6-themed console bundle you can get at Best Buy that’s just $10 more than the usual inflated price. The set […]

item.title: Teenage Engineering just released a stereo mixer that physically connects to its EP-series samplers
item.description: It can control just about everything you plug into it and operates as an audio interface.

item.title: Diabetes Detection Needs Better Tools. They’re on the Way
item.description: Blood glucose levels can be a reliable indicator of diabetes risk. But in some populations, it's not enough to catch the disease early.

item.title: Netflix has its own, impressive AI-powered voice search
item.description: This is Lowpass by Janko Roettgers, a newsletter on the ever-evolving intersection of tech and entertainment, syndicated just for The Verge subscribers once a week. A small subset of Netflix viewers just got a new way to find movies and TV shows. The streamer recently started to test an AI-powered native voice search feature with […]

item.title: Star Fox 64 is getting yet another remake, this time for Nintendo Switch 2
item.description: Nintendo has revealed a new Star Fox game, and it's a Star Fox 64 remake for Switch 2.

item.title: BMW iX3 has a lower starting price than comparable gas-powered X3
item.description: The 2027 BMW iX3 is now available in the US, and its starting price my surprise and delight fans of the Bavarian automaker. The iX3, which is the first vehicle built on BMW's next-gen Neue Klasse platform, starts at $62,850 including shipping, which is about $5,000 less than the equivalent gas-powered BMW X3 M50 xDrive […]

item.title: The AI boom is now consuming more money than Apollo, the ISS, and the Manhattan Project combined — and it’s still accelerating in 2026
item.description: AI investment has exploded beyond the scale of history’s biggest scientific megaprojects — and the world is only beginning to grasp what’s being built.

item.title: Autonomie et recharge en 18 minutes : pourquoi les voitures électriques Hyundai ont une longueur d’avance [Sponso]
item.description: Dans la course technologique que se livrent les différents constructeurs de voitures électriques, Hyundai a une longueur d’avance.

item.title: Canon is launching a new camera next week, and I predict it'll be a vlogging-style full-frame model
item.description: Canon shared a teaser on its socials of its next camera with the tagline 'One camera, many stories', plus a May 13 launch date. Here's what it could be

item.title: Google unveils Whoop-like screenless Fitbit Air
item.description: The device comes with health and fitness tracking like 24/7 heart rate, heart rhythm monitoring with Afib alerts, SpO2, resting heart rate, heart rate variability, sleep stages and duration, and more.

item.title: Top universities among victims named in Canvas data breach - MIT, Oxford and more all hit
item.description: ShinyHunters is increasing the heat on Instructure by listing all of the potential victims of the Canvas breach.

item.title: Apple’s $599 MacBook Neo could be at risk from rising RAM prices
item.description: The MacBook Neo might lose its most appealing trait thanks to the ongoing RAM shortage. According to analyst Tim Culpan, Apple could discontinue the budget-priced $599 base configuration of the Neo, leaving only the $699 model with 512GB of storage. Earlier this week, Apple similarly stopped selling the most affordable configuration of the Mac mini, […]...

item.title: Anthropic se tourne vers SpaceX pour doubler les débits de Claude, mais il y a un piège
item.description: Elon Musk qualifiait Anthropic de « maléfique » il y a quelques semaines. Sa société SpaceX vient de lui confier la totalité de son datacenter. Les affaires sont les affaires.

item.title: Quel ordinateur portable choisir pour moins de 1000 € en 2026 ?
item.description: On trouve aujourd'hui d'excellents ordinateurs portables avec un rapport qualité/prix intéressant. Mais l'offre est très variée, alors comment choisir ? Voici nos recommandations des meilleurs modèles de PC portables sous les 1 000 euros.

item.title: Samsung’s flagship laptop is a MacBook Pro clone gone horribly wrong
item.description: II know I'm not the only person who wants a MacBook Pro for Windows: a sleek, ultra powerful, super portable machine with an excellent screen and high-quality build. Samsung's Galaxy Book6 Ultra certainly tries. It's got a beautiful screen and a nice design, and it's as solidly built as laptops come. It also looks, well, […]

item.title: Startup Battlefield 200 applications close May 27: A shot at VC access, global visibility, TechCrunch coverage, and $100K
item.description: Startup Battlefield 200 applications are open, but only for three more weeks. Apply by May 27 for your shot at VC access, global visibility, TechCrunch coverage, $100,000 equity-free, and more opportunities for major scaling impact.

item.title: Amazon is slashing prices on its top-rated running and walking shoes for summer — 40% off Nike, New Balance, Hoka, and more
item.description: Amazon has a massive sale on its top-rated walking and running shoes just in time for summer, and I'm rounding up the best deals from Nike, Hoka, New Balance, and more.

item.title: Spotify now lets AI agents like OpenClaw generate personal podcasts
item.description: Rejoice, nerds.
